title: Compliance Audit Services India | Virtual Auditor | Virtual Auditor
description: Multi-regulatory compliance audit. Companies Act, FEMA, SEBI, RBI, labour laws, GST. Comprehensive compliance health check.
bodyText:
HEADING1:Compliance Audit Services India | Virtual Auditor

What is Compliance Audit Services India | Virtual Auditor | Virtual Auditor?

Multi-regulatory compliance audit. Companies Act, FEMA, SEBI, RBI, labour laws, GST. Comprehensive compliance health check.
Virtual Auditor provides professional compliance audit services india | virtual auditor services across Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai. Our team of qualified Chartered Accountants (FCA), Company Secretaries (ACS), Certified Fraud Examiners (CFE), and IBBI Registered Valuers ensures compliance and accuracy.
HEADING2:Why Choose Virtual Auditor?
• Fellow Chartered Accountant (FCA) with 14+ years experience
• IBBI Registered Valuer (IBBI/RV/03/2019/12333)
• Certified Fraud Examiner (CFE)
• Associate Company Secretary (ACS)
• Offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai
• 100+ complex valuations completed
HEADING2:Our Approach
We combine deep regulatory expertise with AI-powered tools to deliver accurate, defensible, and timely results. Every engagement is led by CA V. Viswanathan, ensuring senior-level attention.
HEADING2:Offices
Chennai (HQ): G-131, Ground Floor, Phase 3, Spencer Plaza Mall, Anna Salai, Chennai 600002. Phone: +91 99622 60333.
Bangalore: 7th Floor, Mahalakshmi Chambers, 29, MG Road, Bangalore 560001. Phone: +91 95139 39333.
Mumbai: Workafella, AK Estate, SV Road, Goregaon West, Mumbai 400062. Phone: +91 77000 89597.
Email: support@virtualauditor.in

Our compliance audit practice examines adherence to specific regulatory requirements including Companies Act, 2013, SEBI regulations, RBI guidelines, FEMA provisions, labour laws, and industry-specific regulations. The engagement involves: regulatory framework mapping, compliance testing against applicable laws, gap identification and risk assessment, compliance report with findings and recommendations, and remediation advisory. We use technology-enabled compliance tracking tools for comprehensive coverage. Our team serves organizations across manufacturing, financial services, technology, and healthcare sectors.
Why Choose Virtual Auditor?

Virtual Auditor brings a unique combination of professional credentials (FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI Registered Valuer) and technology-driven service delivery. Our digital-first approach enables efficient engagement management with real-time status tracking for clients. We maintain strict confidentiality through secure document handling protocols and encrypted communication channels. Our team provides responsive support with dedicated relationship managers for each engagement. With offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai, and a pan-India service capability through our digital infrastructure, we serve clients ranging from startups to listed corporations. Contact us for a free initial consultation to discuss your specific requirements and receive a customized service proposal.
